creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
It has been reported on the freebsd-hackers@ mailing list that the OSABI reported by "readelf --fileheader" for GCC is NONE (0) instead of FreeBSD (9).

Link to the archived mail report: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2024-September/003825.html
